filesystem: POSIX file locking (flock in system-errors.log lock)
devin_specific_tools: mcp_call_tool (assumed if MCP servers are used, though Matrix core focuses on file states)
agent_format: XML blocks for persona, activation, domain

blockers: run_subagent tool is a proprietary Devin capability for spawning stateless subagents. Other runtimes like Claude Code or OpenHands have different subagent mechanisms.
The 'skill' construct (.agents/skills vs .agents/agents) is native to Devin.
Permissions strings 'Read(**)', 'Write(matrix/**)' are parsed by the Devin/Windsurf runtime.
portable_elements: Markdown prompt formats (easily injected into any LLM context)
